description: Advanced Mimir metrics ingestion analytics. Track samples ingested, active series cardinality, distributor throughput, and identify top metric producers by label.

panels.description: Rate of samples being ingested across all distributors. Primary throughput indicator for the write path.
panels.title: Samples Ingested/sec

panels.description: Total active time series across all ingesters. Key cardinality indicator.
panels.title: Active Series

panels.description: Rate of exemplars being ingested. Exemplars link metrics to trace spans for deeper observability.
panels.title: Exemplars Ingested/sec

panels.description: Rate of push requests hitting the distributors. Indicates write-path demand.
panels.title: Distributor Request Rate

panels.description: 95th percentile write latency for push requests. Values above 500ms indicate distributor or ingester pressure.
panels.title: Write Latency P95

panels.description: Rate of 4xx/5xx errors on the push path. Non-zero sustained errors require investigation.
panels.title: Ingestion Errors/sec

panels.description: Samples ingested per second broken down by cluster. Spikes may indicate new scrape targets or config changes.
panels.title: Samples Ingested Over Time

panels.description: Active series trend. Sustained growth indicates cardinality creep.
panels.title: Active Series Over Time
Top Producers — Who's Sending the Most Metrics

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by total active series. High-cardinality tenants drive memory and storage costs.
panels.title: Top 10 Tenants by Active Series

panels.description: Top 10 tenants ranked by samples ingested per second. Identifies the heaviest writers.
panels.title: Top 10 Tenants by Ingestion Rate

panels.description: Write-path latency distribution across P50, P90, P95, and P99. Helps identify tail latency issues in the push path.
panels.title: Distributor Latency Percentiles

panels.description: Push request rate broken down by HTTP status code. 4xx indicates client issues (rate limiting, validation). 5xx indicates server-side failures.
panels.title: Request Rate by Status Code

panels.description: Average number of samples per push request. Low values may indicate inefficient batching.
panels.title: Samples per Request

panels.description: Series distribution across ingesters. Large imbalance indicates poor hashing.
panels.title: Active Series by Ingester

panels.description: Head chunks per ingester. Correlates with memory consumption.
panels.title: Ingester Memory Usage

panels.description: Discarded samples by reason. Common reasons: rate limiting, out-of-order, too many series.
panels.title: Discarded Samples

panels.description: Write errors (4xx/5xx) on the push path broken down by cluster. Persistent errors indicate misconfigured clients or capacity issues.
panels.title: Write Errors by Cluster

panels.description: Compactor run rate split by completed and failed. Failed compactions can lead to query degradation and storage bloat.
panels.title: Compactor Runs

panels.description: Rate of TSDB blocks being uploaded to long-term object storage. Sustained zero may indicate ingester flush or shipper issues.
panels.title: Block Upload Rate

title: Mimir — Metrics Ingestion & Cardinality Analytics
